title: Day 43 Lesson 3 ( Video )Talking about whether the presentation preparation has been finished or not
html:
Day 43 Lesson 31 

プレゼンテーションの　準備じゅんびが　終おわったか　どうか、話はなす   = Talking about whether the presentation preparation has been finished or not

場所 ばしょ = Location:  会社かいしゃ  = Company

登場人物   とうじょうじんぶつ = Characters:   キムさん  外国人がいこくじん,　高橋たかはしさんと山田やまださん   日本人 にほんじん = Kim-san foreigner, Takahashi-san and Yamada-san Japanese people

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
